name: canopy
description: Canopy — the team's shared context store. Skills + MCP wiring to read, orient against, and record into the team brain.

plugins.name: canopy
plugins.description: orient→work→record skills (canopy, load-context, record-session) + my-work + the admin plan skills (read-plan, update-plan) + the auto-wired Canopy MCP server. Set $CANOPY_MCP_TOKEN to your personal bearer (minted in Canopy → Settings → MCP access tokens).
